task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no consecutive hyphens), False otherwise.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 security group IDs (format: sg- followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters).
